title: HeartLife (Season 4 of zLife)
description:
This is a Life-Series inspired datapack/mod

All players start with 4 lives, and every time you die, your hearts are randomized from 7 to 13

Can you survive with friends? Or will your world fall into bloodshed?
body:
# zLife Season Four!
## Welcome to HeartLife

This is a Life-Series inspired datapack/mod

You Start The season on 4 Lives.
> On four lives your name is Dark Green
> 
> Lime on 3
> 
> Yellow on 2,
> 
> Red on 1,
> 
> and Dark Red after (More on this later)

Every time you die, your hearts are randomized from 7 - 13. Players with 2-4 Lives are not allowed to kill, But once they reach their Red Life (One life), then are allowed to kill anyone, gaining hearts as rewards. The killer will gain more hearts the greater amount of lives the player had when they died.

<details>
<summary>Dark Red Life.</summary>

If you had 15 or more hearts when you died as a red life, you will given one final chance. On this final Life, you gain an extra heart on top of the one you'd already gain for getting a kill.


</details>
If you die on your final life, you will be eliminated, and set into spectator mode!


Here is a video about the series!
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/dExRKek-cC8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
